channel.title: NSF News
channel.description: News posted on the NSF website

item.title: Podcast: Photonic quantum chips promise fast future
item.description: Milos Popovic, an NSF-supported associate professor, discusses a collaboration that has built a photonic quantum system into a traditional electronic chip...
item.dc:creator: NSF

item.title: NSF announces 2026 Graduate Research Fellowship Program award offers
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation today announced that it has made offers and will award 2,500 Graduate Research Fellowships for the 2026-2027 academic year...
item.dc:creator: NSF

item.description: Empty title entry to exercise the title_missing path.
item.dc:creator: NSF
